postReview.title: Odegaard feels back to his best as Norway stay perfect in World Cup qualifying
postReview.description: Martin Odegaard recorded three assists as Norway dominated Israel, taking their tally to nine goals in two 2026 World Cup qualifiers.

QAData.question: Who won between Israel and Norway on Tue, 25 Mar 2025 19:45:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Norway won 4–2 over Israel on Tue, 25 Mar 2025 19:45:00 GMT.
